data.text: {"text":"John Smith works at Microsoft in Bengaluru."},
{"text":"Google opened a new office in Hyderabad."},
{"text":"Amazon hired Priya as a software engineer."},
{"text":"The meeting starts at 10:30 AM on Monday."},
{"text":"Apple launched a new product in California."},
{"text":"The conference will be held on 5 August 2026."},
{"text":"Maria visited the Taj Mahal in Agra."},
{"text":"Samsung opened a research center in Noida."},
{"text":"The interview is scheduled for 9:00 AM tomorrow."},
{"text":"The doctor prescribed the medicine on 20 March 2026."},
